subcodes.first_line: The sheltering shade is that shadow which delivereth souls from the fire of self and desire and bestoweth rest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ظل ظلیل آن ظلی است که نفوس را از نار نفس و هوی نجات میدهد و راحت میبخشد
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
